name: Lekki Conservation Centre
description: A nature reserve famous for its canopy walkway, wildlife, and peaceful environment.

name: Nike Art Gallery
description: One of the largest art galleries in West Africa showcasing Nigerian culture and creativity.

name: National Theatre
description: A historic landmark for performing arts and cultural events in Nigeria.

name: Tarkwa Bay Beach
description: A sheltered beach accessible by boat, perfect for relaxation and water sports.

name: Freedom Park
description: A cultural and historical site that hosts concerts, festivals, and exhibitions.

name: Lekki Arts and Crafts Market
description: A vibrant market offering handmade crafts, souvenirs, and artworks.

name: Agbakoba Park
description: A beautifully landscaped garden ideal for picnics, relaxation, and outdoor events.

name: Elegushi Beach
description: A popular private beach known for entertainment, food, and nightlife.
